title: rabdosia taiwanensis
intro: Rabdosia taiwanensis, also known as Taiwan yun zhang, is a type of plant species that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is used in traditional Chinese medicine and has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including the potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exert antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Rabdosia taiwanensis are typically made into teas, infusions, or capsules, and are often used to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections.
